content:
1 min read
1 hour ago

--

Why this feature: A task list tells you what to do but not how your day looks as a whole. The summariser gives you that bird’s-eye view in one second without you having to read every item yourself.
Technical decisions: Used Google Gemini Pro via the @google/generative-ai SDK. Chose a one-shot call (not streaming) because the output is short and showing it word by word adds no value here. Structured the prompt to include task text, tag, and done status so the AI has full context.
How I built it: Formatted the tasks array into a readable string inside the prompt. Kept the component isolated — it only receives tasks as a prop and handles its own API call, loading, and error state internally.
What I’d do differently: Possibly cache the last summary so it doesn’t disappear on re-render. Also, initially wanted to do a speech to text AI feature, so users could easily just talk and have their tasks written out for them.
